scripts.deploy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.deploy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.deploy:preview: bunx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env.staging -- bun alchemy deploy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.destroy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.destroy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.destroy:preview: bunx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env.staging -- bun alchemy destroy --app cf-starter-ping
scripts.dev: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=local -e ../../.env.local -- bun alchemy dev --app cf-starter-ping
